nasb.text: When You did awesome things which we did not expect, You came down, the mountains quaked at Your presence.

esv.text: When you did awesome things that we did not look for, you came down, the mountains quaked at your presence.

cnv.text: 你行了可畏的事，是我們料想不到的， 那時你降臨，群山都在你面前震動。

ccb.text: 你曾降临，行超乎我们预料的可畏之事， 那时群山在你面前战抖。

csbs.text: 你行了可畏之事， 是我们没有预料的； 那时你就降临， 群山在你面前震动。
